category_sources: source_facts.description identifies Gwenhywfar as a utility library required by AqBanking; official AqBanking family page describes Gwenhywfar as an operating-system abstraction and multifunction library.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides gwenhywfar; official project page and AqBanking family pages use Gwenhywfar.
docs_sources: Official project page is the best available documentation surface for Gwenhywfar; official source tree also contains project documentation files.
repo_sources: Official AqBanking Git server lists Gwenhywfar with clone URL https://git.aquamaniac.de/git/gwenhywfar.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it is a utility library for AqBanking-related software; official AqBanking family page describes its OS abstraction and multifunction library role.
